crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.desktopDescription: AlterSend hit an unexpected error and needs to restart. The transfer worker may be in an inconsistent state, so a restart is the safest option.
crash.mobileDescription: AlterSend hit an unexpected error. Try again, or close and reopen the app if the problem persists.

bridgeUnavailable.title: Electron bridge unavailable
bridgeUnavailable.description: This renderer is running without the desktop bridge. Restart AlterSend from the desktop app.

transfer.peerUnreachable: Couldn't reach the sender. Check the code and try again.
